title: Servlet Request-Response Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle and processing flow of an HTTP request by a Java Servlet within a web container.
relationships: 2. Web Server receives request and forwards to Servlet Container
3. Container manages Servlet lifecycle (init, service, destroy)
5. Servlet may interact with Database or other resources
6. Servlet generates dynamic content and sends HTTP Response
7. Container sends response back to Client
